name: @kroma/androidtv
description: KROMA Android TV client WebView shell over @kroma/tv + native media3/ExoPlayer engine.

scripts.build: tsgo --noEmit && vite build && bun run sync:android
scripts.sync:android: rm -rf android/app/src/main/assets/kroma && mkdir -p android/app/src/main/assets/kroma && cp -R dist/. android/app/src/main/assets/kroma/
scripts.package: echo 'Run: bun run build:androidtv, then: cd clients/androidtv/android && ./gradlew assembleRelease'
